description: Style NoteBeat the summer heat with sepia's new range of tops. If light colours, comfortable material and fashionable styles is just what you looking for then then this would be the right choice. These stylish and feminine tops could be worn with a pair of black tights or leggings to bring out the intricacies of the top.Product DetailsMulti-hued half sleeve top with inner camisole, has a V-neck and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% polyesterRinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery & printDry on reverse side under sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
